docs.name: Logo Marquee Hero
docs.description: A classic SaaS hero: bold headline above two ticker rows of partner / customer logos scrolling in opposite directions. CSS mask softens the edges, reduced-motion freezes the rows, and the brand list is fully customizable.

props.name: children
props.description: Slotted hero content above the marquee rows. Pass your own headline / subhead / CTAs. When omitted, a default composition renders.

props.name: logos
props.description: Brand names rendered as the ticker items. Defaults to a placeholder list.

props.name: secondaryLogos
props.description: Optional second row. `undefined` (default) reverses the primary list; `null` hides the second row.

props.name: speed
props.description: Loop duration in seconds for the primary row. The second row runs slightly slower for visual interest.

docs.usageCode:

docs.overview: Headline + dual-row logo ticker. Drop-in for SaaS landing pages where social proof sits beside the value proposition.

changes: Anchored each row's start frame so motion v12's `repeat: Infinity` loop runs after hydration (previously froze in production where SSR baked in the target translation).
Initial release: headline + dual-row logo ticker with reduced-motion freeze and customizable brand list.
